results.title: Starlight: what Raj Khosla taught me about fame, failure and legacy
results.description: Mahesh Bhatt reflects on his mentor Raj Khosla, the influence of Guru Dutt, and the lessons that shaped his life and career. In a moving tribute, he recalls fame, failure, legacy and the enduring power of artistic inheritance.

results.title: EastEnders icons unrecognisable 30 years after soap’s groundbreaking storyline – can you guess who?
results.description: TWO EastEnders icons are looking unrecognisable these days, 30 years after the soap's groundbreaking storyline in 1996. The actors were part of one of the first same-sex romances and gay kisses on a mainstream British soap. Have you guessed who they are yet? It's none other than EastEnders legends Andrew Lynford and Mark Homer, who...

results.title: BBC’s Brexit and Gareth Southgate docs land level at 9pm
results.description: MONDAY: Brook Lapping’s political doc on par with Cardiff Productions’ examination of male mental health
